example: She has the ability to stay calm under pressure.
exampleTr: Baskı altında sakin kalma yeteneğine sahip.

definitionEn: having the power or skill to do something
example: I am able to finish my homework before dinner.
He accepted the job offer yesterday.

definitionEn: a record of money or an online profile
example: I created a new account for the app.
exampleTr: Uygulama için yeni bir hesap oluşturdum.

example: She achieved her goal after months of study.

definitionEn: from one side to the other
example: They walked across the bridge.
Please act carefully in the lab.
Quick action saved the project.
She stays active by walking every day.

definitionEn: something you do for work or fun
example: Reading is my favorite free-time activity.
exampleTr: Okumak benim en sevdiğim boş zaman etkinliğim.

definitionEn: to put something together with something else
example: Add some milk to your coffee.

definitionEn: details of where someone lives or to speak to
example: Please write your address clearly.
Every adult needs time to rest.

definitionEn: an opinion about what someone should do
example: My teacher gave me useful advice.
Lack of sleep can affect your focus.
The child is afraid of loud noises.
We went home after the movie.
Please say that again slowly.

definitionEn: the number of years someone has lived
example: At the age of ten, he loved science.
I agree with your idea.

definitionEn: the mixture of gases around us
example: Fresh air helps me feel better.
exampleTr: Temiz hava kendimi daha iyi hissetmemi sağlar.

example: My parents allow me to stay out late on Fridays.
exampleTr: Ailem cuma günleri geç çıkmama izin veriyor.

example: I almost missed the bus this morning.
She likes to study alone at night.

definitionEn: before now or earlier than expected
example: I have already finished the report.
She speaks English and also German.
He always arrives on time.
The view from the hill was amazing.
Drink a small amount of water often.
exampleTr: Sık sık az miktarda su iç.

definitionEn: something said or written in reply
example: Your answer is correct.
Stars appear at night.

definitionEn: to make a request or use something
example: You can apply for the scholarship online.

definitionEn: a part of a place or subject
example: This area is very quiet in the evening.

definitionEn: to speak angrily because you disagree
example: They argue about money too often.

definitionEn: one of the two upper body limbs
example: He hurt his arm during the match.

definitionEn: on every side or in many places
example: There are trees around the house.
We arrived at school early.

definitionEn: creative work such as painting or music
example: Modern art can be difficult to understand.
Ask your teacher if you need help.
The article attacks the old policy strongly.
exampleTr: Makale eski politikaya sert şekilde saldırıyor.

example: Pay attention to the instructions.
She lives in a beautiful town.
He wants to become a doctor.
The lesson begins at nine.
I believe your story.
This is the best part of the film.
I feel better today.

definitionEn: in the space separating two things
example: The bank is between the café and the post office.
The village lies beyond the river.

definitionEn: to make something by putting parts together
example: They plan to build a new library.
exampleTr: Yeni bir kütüphane inşa etmeyi planlıyorlar.

example: I am too busy to go out tonight.
exampleTr: Bu gece dışarı çıkamayacak kadar meşgulüm.

definitionEn: the activity of buying and selling
example: Her family runs a small business.

definitionEn: to phone or speak loudly to someone
example: Call me when you get home.

definitionEn: the process of looking after someone or something
example: Good sleep is important for your health care.
Can you carry this bag for me?
exampleTr: Bu çantayı benim için taşıyabilir misin?

definitionEn: to stop and hold something that is moving
example: She tried to catch the ball.
Weather can change quickly here.
Please check your answers again.

definitionEn: to decide which thing you want
example: Choose a topic for your project.
Her explanation was clear and simple.
The shop closes at eight.

definitionEn: happening often or shared by many people
example: It is common to make mistakes while learning.

definitionEn: to examine two things to see differences
example: Compare the two photos carefully.

definitionEn: to finish or having all parts
example: Complete the form before you leave.
We should consider a cheaper option.
Please continue reading the text.
Your pronunciation is correct now.
Students create posters for the event.
It is hard to decide quickly.
Practice helps you develop strong skills.

definitionEn: the way things are not the same
example: Can you see the difference between them?

definitionEn: not easy to do or understand
example: This question looks difficult.
We arrived early for the meeting.

definitionEn: the process of teaching and learning
example: Education changes people’s lives.
We have enough time to finish.

definitionEn: something that shows what a rule means
example: Give me an example sentence.
Work experience is useful for students.
Can you explain this rule again?
It is a fact that water freezes in cold weather.
exampleTr: Suyun soğuk havada donduğu bir gerçektir.

definitionEn: to notice an emotion or sensation
example: I feel tired after long classes.

definitionEn: to go after or obey something
example: Follow the map to the station.
exampleTr: İstasyona gitmek için haritayı takip et.

example: Please fill in the form online.

definitionEn: a number of people or things together
example: Our study group meets every weekend.
exampleTr: Çalışma grubumuz her hafta sonu buluşur.

example: Plants grow faster in the sun.
What happened after the exam?

definitionEn: to make something easier for someone
example: These notes help me remember words.
exampleTr: Bu notlar kelimeleri hatırlamama yardımcı oluyor.

example: That is a great idea for the project.
exampleTr: Bu proje için harika bir fikir.

example: Sleep is important for memory.

definitionEn: to have something as part of a whole
example: The price includes breakfast.

definitionEn: the feeling of wanting to know more
example: Music is one of her main interests.
exampleTr: Müzik onun ana ilgi alanlarından biridir.

example: Traffic is a serious issue in big cities.
exampleTr: Trafik büyük şehirlerde ciddi bir sorundur.

example: He found a part-time job near school.
exampleTr: Okula yakın yarı zamanlı bir iş buldu.

definitionEn: to continue to have or do something
example: Keep your notes in one notebook.
She is always kind to new students.
exampleTr: Yeni öğrencilere karşı her zaman naziktir.

example: I want to learn ten new words today.
exampleTr: Bugün on yeni kelime öğrenmek istiyorum.

definitionEn: to go away from a place
example: We leave home at seven.

definitionEn: a stage or amount of progress
example: My English level is improving.
I have little free time this week.
exampleTr: Bu hafta az boş vaktim var.

example: They live in Erzurum now.
I buy food from local shops.
The main problem is time.

definitionEn: to control or succeed in doing something
example: Can you manage this team well?
What does this word mean?

definitionEn: a particular way of doing something
example: This method works for vocabulary practice.
exampleTr: Bu yöntem kelime çalışması için işe yarıyor.

example: Wait a minute, please.
Move the chair closer to the table.
I need more practice.
I often review old words.
exampleTr: Eski kelimeleri sık sık tekrar ederim.

definitionEn: the arrangement of things or a request to buy
example: Put the words in alphabetical order.

definitionEn: one side of a sheet in a book
example: Read page twelve before class.
exampleTr: Dersten önce on ikinci sayfayı oku.

example: This is the hardest part of the lesson.
Every person learns differently.
This is a quiet place to study.
exampleTr: Burası çalışmak için sakin bir yer.

example: Make a study plan for the week.
exampleTr: Hafta için bir çalışma planı yap.

definitionEn: repeated work to improve a skill
example: Daily practice improves memory.
We need to solve this problem together.
The teacher asked an easy question.

definitionEn: to keep something in your mind
example: I can remember that word now.
Hard work brings good results.
Review these words tomorrow.

definitionEn: correct or the side opposite left
example: You chose the right answer.
We have the same idea.
School starts in September.
Show me your vocabulary list.
Use simple sentences in the quiz.
Write the small words clearly.
Let’s start with ten words.
Every student needs a good system.
exampleTr: Her öğrencinin iyi bir sisteme ihtiyacı var.

example: I study English every evening.
This system tracks your weak words.
exampleTr: Bu sistem zayıf kelimelerini takip eder.

definitionEn: a group of people working together
example: Our team finished the project early.
Paste the text into the box.
Think before you choose the answer.
Today I will review my notes.

definitionEn: to know the meaning of something
example: I understand this sentence now.

definitionEn: to do something with a thing for a purpose
example: Use the word in a short sentence.
I usually study after dinner.
I want to improve my English.
This is a good way to memorize words.
exampleTr: Bu, kelime ezberlemek için iyi bir yol.

example: I set a new goal every week.
exampleTr: Her hafta yeni bir hedef belirlerim.

example: Write each word in your notebook.

definitionEn: to do a job or activity
example: Hard work improves your skills.
Write the answer clearly.
